about.intro: I am an experienced DevOps Engineer with a strong track record of designing scalable, secure, and fully automated cloud infrastructures. I specialize in Azure cloud, CI/CD pipeline engineering, and modern container orchestration—enabling engineering teams to deliver software faster, safer, and with greater reliability.
about.whatIDo: I build and automate cloud-native environments that support seamless deployments, efficient operations, and high-performance applications. My experience spans end-to-end pipeline automation, container platform management, and production reliability engineering.
strengths: Deep understanding of cloud security, RBAC policies, and governance frameworks
Strong focus on incident management, continuous improvement, and operational excellence
Proven ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams to streamline delivery cycles
about.mission: To accelerate business outcomes by delivering automation-driven, resilient, and scalable systems—powered by modern DevOps practices and cloud technologies.

highlights.title: Frontend Development
highlights.description: Building responsive and interactive UIs using React, Vue, and modern CSS.

highlights.title: Backend Development
highlights.description: Creating RESTful APIs and microservices with Node.js, Python, and Go.

highlights.title: Cloud Computing
highlights.description: Deploying and managing applications on AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud Platform.

highlights.title: Database Management
highlights.description: Designing and optimizing SQL and NoSQL databases like PostgreSQL and MongoDB.

experience.description:
• Developed and maintained Azure DevOps, CI/CD pipelines enabling automated build, test, and deployment workflows, resulting in faster and more reliable releases.
• Designed, deployed, and managed containerized applications using Docker and Kubernetes/OpenShift to improve environment consistency and scalability.
• Implemented Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform and Ansible to automate provisioning, configuration, and lifecycle management of cloud resources.
• Integrated Helm charts for streamlined OCP deployment management and versioned application releases.
• Managed build artifacts and Docker images through JFrog Artifactory, maintaining governance and integrity of deployment packages.
• Configured end-to-end monitoring using Prometheus, Grafana, and Azure Monitor to improve system observability and reduce incident resolution time.
• Utilized Git for version control and collaborated through branching, pull requests, and release management best practices.
• Improved system reliability and performance through automation scripts using Bash on Linux-based environments.
• Reduced costs around $120K by migrating legacy workloads and monolithic applications to cloud-native and containerized platform.
• Creating/managing an automated DevOps release management pipeline which delivered tooling for next generation application development efforts (the Dev) and on-going production operations (the Ops).
• Implemented Aqua scanning in CI/CD pipelines to improve compliance and strengthen container security monitoring.
• Documented troubleshooting procedures and technical best practices in Confluence and Wiki, improving team knowledge sharing and reducing issue resolution time.
• Reduced deployment lead time from weeks to days through Agile collaboration and DevOps automation adoption.
• Hands-on experience with JIRA, ServiceNow, and Azure Boards for incident management, change tracking, and collaboration across Agile development and operations teams.

• Developed and maintained microservices in GoLang, leveraging Go routines and Channels for high-performance concurrency.
• Working in container based technologies like Docker and Kubernetes.
• Developed responsive, mobile-first web applications using Angular, TypeScript, HTML, CSS and Bootstrap with integrating third-party libraries and services.
• Implemented lazy loading of routes in Angular applications to improve performance and reduce the initial loading time.
• Implemented reactive and template-driven forms in Angular applications, including form validation and error handling.
• Extensively used SASS for responsive design of application.

• Developed reactive websites for desktop and mobile screens using HTML, CSS, JavaScript and Angular Framework and Involved in Unit testing of Application.
• Involved in UI/UX design of the application using Angular.
